note: Annotations committed BEFORE re-scanning per kill_criteria.md protocol

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference tarfile.extractall without member path sanitization
cves.description_short: TarSlip in djl: tar extracted without member path validation

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference unsanitized path in proxied artifact handler or path traversal in handlers.py
cves.description_short: LFI in mlflow: proxied artifact path not sanitized before send_file

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference zipfile.extractall without member name validation
cves.description_short: Zip-slip in CodeChecker: ZIP extracted without member name check

cves.vulnerable_sink: get_path() lines 72-90: cache_path = base_cache_dir / store_path without boundary check
cves.match_definition: Finding must reference path traversal in cdn_helper.py get_path or put_in_cache
cves.description_short: LFI in solara: get_path() lacks boundary check present in sibling function

cves.vulnerable_sink: doGet() lines 94-105: URLDecoder.decode before UNSAFE_RESOURCE regex
cves.match_definition: Finding must reference decode-before-check ordering or path traversal in ByteStreamController
cves.description_short: GeoWebCache path traversal: URL decode runs before regex filter

cves.vulnerable_sink: db->query() ~L114: raw concatenation of unsanitized data into SQL
cves.match_definition: Finding must reference SQL injection or unsanitized db->query in divido.php
cves.description_short: SQL injection in OpenCart Divido payment: raw concatenation into query

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference command injection or execSync with user-controlled path in util-os
cves.description_short: OS command injection in HFS: user path interpolated into execSync

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference XSS or unsanitized HTML in content_helper.rb or ActionText attachment rendering
cves.description_short: Stored XSS in Rails ActionText: attachment HTML rendered before sanitizer

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference unsafe SnakeYAML deserialization (new Yaml without SafeConstructor)
cves.description_short: SnakeYAML unsafe deser in Hertzbeat: new Yaml().load() without type restriction

cves.vulnerable_sink: InitRoutes: OperationLogMiddleware deserializes request body (actual sink in middleware/)
cves.match_definition: Finding must reference unsafe deserialization in operation log middleware or routes.go
cves.description_short: Unsafe deser in gotribe-admin: global middleware deserializes request body

cves.vulnerable_sink: setDisabled: saveDocument() executes user profile with admin Velocity context
cves.match_definition: Finding must reference code injection via Velocity rendering or privilege escalation in XWikiUser
cves.description_short: XWiki code injection: disabling user executes profile with admin rights

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference eval() with non-literal argument in math.py
cves.description_short: MEGABOT: user Discord input passed directly to eval()

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference new Function with tainted argument or code injection in template compile
cves.description_short: Template injection: user template compiled into new Function()

cves.vulnerable_sink: compile(): raw() concatenates $this->flag into PHP code, lines 24-30
cves.match_definition: Finding must reference code injection or unsanitized raw() in Twig compilation
cves.description_short: Shopware Twig tag injects unsanitized flag into generated PHP code

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference eval() with file-derived setting value in ThreeMFReader
cves.description_short: Cura 3MF reader: eval() on setting value from untrusted model file

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference file inclusion with user-controlled path or $_POST in include path
cves.description_short: 123solar: POST param used directly in PHP include() path

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference SSTI or unsandboxed Jinja2 Environment in message_dispatch_service
cves.description_short: Fides SSTI: DB-stored template rendered with unsandboxed Jinja2 Environment

cves.vulnerable_sink: requests.get(url) lines 105-107: endpoint from user query without SSRF protection
cves.match_definition: Finding must reference SSRF or unvalidated URL in instatus_handler requests calls
cves.description_short: MindsDB SSRF: handler passes user-controlled endpoint to requests without validation

cves.vulnerable_sink: Role update triggers URL fetch via ItemsService without SSRF filter
cves.match_definition: Finding must reference SSRF or unvalidated URL fetch in roles service or import pipeline
cves.description_short: Directus SSRF bypass: roles endpoint skips DNS-resolution SSRF filter

cves.match_definition: Finding must reference SSRF or unvalidated endpoint_url in boto3/cloud_provider
cves.description_short: CVAT SSRF: user-supplied S3 endpoint_url passed to boto3 without validation
